title: ATLAS: Bulk Extraction via ML Inference API (AML.T0024 / AML.T0040)
description: Surfaces clients issuing high volumes of inference requests against LLM/ML application endpoints, the telemetry signature of model-extraction and data-exfiltration via the inference API. Ranks Client IP + Service Name by request count and distinct routes touched using only SOC Application Logs fields. Triage threshold: investigate clients with anomalously high Calls relative to the per-service baseline. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0024 (Exfiltration via ML Inference API) and AML.T0040 (ML Inference API Access).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*/v1/chat*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/completions*' or 'Request URL' like '*/v1/embeddings*' or 'Request URL' like '*/llm/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/ai/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/generate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/predict*' or 'Request URL' like '*/invoke*') | stats count as Calls, distinctcount('Request URL') as DistinctRoutes, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Sessions by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Calls
falsepositives: Batch inference jobs or load tests from an approved automation account
High-traffic legitimate integrations (chatbots, RAG pipelines) with a known baseline
